top_contracts.description: The purpose Of task order #80 is to acquire contract audit support services in support Of the NASA headquarters office Of procurement in accordance with the attached Statement Of Work (SOW) incorporated herein.
top_contracts.generated_award_summary: Ensuring fiscal accountability for NASA Headquarters contracts.

top_grants.description: This project will generate a new catalog of unique ultraviolet (UV) sources  screened of significant artifacts  that includes all valid imaging data produced by the galaxy evolution explorer (GALEX)  an all-sky survey mission with two uv bands. This data set is unique and extremely valuable no uv sky survey that is comparable or better in depth  coverage  sensitivity  and precision is planned.
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Generating a unique, artifact-free UV source catalog from GALEX.

top_grants.description: This project will create an open source  python-based tool capable of reading the vast majority of data (including tables and images) and metadata formats currently archived by the PDS  as well as some formats common in planetary science research
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Creating a universal tool for accessing archived planetary science data.
Analyzing complex turbulence within the Sun's active regions

top_grants.description: Galaxy gas economy star formation and gas supply in galaxies over cosmic times
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Researching the gas supply fueling galaxy growth across cosmic times.

top_grants.description: Advancing land cover/land use characteristics in short-range numerical weather prediction systems for urban areas
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Improving urban weather forecasts using land cover data.
